scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) where html and baseUri are non-null invokes treeBuilder.parse and returns Document
scenarios.precondition: Parser p = new Parser(new FakeTreeBuilder()); // FakeTreeBuilder.parse returns dummy Document
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is dummy instance from FakeTreeBuilder
pseudocode: TEST TC01 parseInput String overload success

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) where reader and baseUri are non-null invokes treeBuilder.parse and returns Document
scenarios.precondition: Parser p = new Parser(new FakeTreeBuilder()); // using real Reader
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is dummy instance from FakeTreeBuilder
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O2 parseInput Reader overload success

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with null html throws NullPointerException before parse
parseInput(Reader, String) with null Reader throws NullPointerException before parse
parseInput(String, String) where treeBuilder.parse throws IllegalStateException propagates exception
scenarios.precondition: Parser p = new Parser(new FakeTreeBuilderThrows()); // throws IllegalStateException
pseudocode: TEST TC05 parseInput builder throws on String

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) where treeBuilder.parse throws IllegalArgumentException propagates exception
scenarios.precondition: Parser p = new Parser(new FakeTreeBuilderThrowsArg()); // throws IllegalArgumentException
pseudocode: TEST TC06_O2 parseInput builder throws on Reader
